name: William J. Lansing
title: Chief Executive Officer
description: Leads the overall strategic direction and operations of FICO as the top executive of the company.

name: Steven P. Weber
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
description: Oversees all financial operations, planning, and reporting for FICO.

name: Stephanie Covert
title: Executive Vice President, Software
description: Leads the software business segment, driving growth and product strategy for FICO's platform and applications.

name: Sally Taylor-Shoff
title: Senior Vice President, Scores
description: Oversees FICO's scores business, including the widely used FICO Score franchise.

name: Mark Scadina
title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary
description: Manages all legal affairs, corporate governance, and compliance matters for FICO.

name: Nikhil Behl
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer
description: Directs FICO's global marketing strategy, brand development, and go-to-market initiatives.

name: Claus Moldt
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer
description: Leads FICO's technology strategy, engineering, and product development efforts.

name: Wayne Huyard
title: Executive Vice President, Go-to-Market
description: Oversees global sales, customer success, and go-to-market execution across FICO's business segments.

name: Joanne Olsen
title: Executive Vice President, Global Sales and Services
description: Responsible for driving global revenue growth through sales and professional services organizations.

name: Mike Pung
title: Senior Vice President, Finance
description: Supports the CFO in managing financial planning, analysis, and operational finance functions.
